headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Henry Schein, Lowers Price Target to $85
summary: UBS  analyst Kevin Caliendo   maintains Henry Schein (NASDAQ:HSIC) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $87 to $85.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Henry Schein, Lowers Price Target to $82
summary: Mizuho  analyst Steven Valiquette   maintains Henry Schein (NASDAQ:HSIC) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $88 to $82.
